caption.caption: Error
WAIT... PRINTING NOT COMPLETETED

text.name: Text8
text.caption: CALIBRATION ENABLED! DISABLE THE CALIBRATION TO START THE CYCLE

text.name: Text9
text.caption: MANUAL MODE ENABLED! DISABLE THE MANUAL MODE TO START THE CYCLE

caption.caption: Error
DOOR(S) ARE DEPRESSURIZED ENSURE THAT DOOR(S) ARE NOT OBSTRUCTED SELECT DOOR MENU TO PRESSURIZE DOOR(S)
CYCLE SELECT & START

animateVisibility.expression: {[SterisPW]tPrintingCompleted.DN} AND {[SterisPW]aiConfiguration[2].3} AND NOT {[SterisPW]bDoorsDepressurized} AND ({[SterisPW]dm2.13} == 0) AND ({::[SterisPW]Program:MainProgram.dM1.24} == 0) AND ({::[SterisPW]Program:MainProgram.abSeqDoorCheck[0]} OR ({[SterisPW]udtHardwareConfig.dMdl}==2))

vbaItem.vbaCode:
Private Permission As Boolean Private AllDisplays As Displays
Private WithEvents HMIAppCli As DisplayClient.Application 'app events used to update real time status Attribute HMIAppCli.VB_VarHelpID = -1
Private Sub Display_AnimationStart() On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
Set AllDisplays = LoadedDisplays ' Load All Displays
Set HMIAppCli = Me.Application
Call SetObjectSecurity ' Set Control Object Security
Exit Sub
ErrorHandler: LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: Display_AnimationStart(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError Resume Next End Sub Private Sub HMIAppCli_Login(ByVal UserName As String)
Call GetCurrentUserCode Call SetObjectSecurity
End Sub Public Sub GetCurrentUserCode() ' Extract Curent User Security Code
AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityEngineer = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("A") AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecuritySupervisor = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("B") AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityOperator = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("C") AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityGuest = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("D") AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityMaintenance = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("E")
End Sub Private Sub SetObjectSecurity()
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
Permission = AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityEngineer Or AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityMaintenance Or AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecuritySupervisor Or AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityOperator
If Permission And AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").bReportMaster Then 'MC 2024-06-06 APG12091 no printing button
btnStartCycle.Visible = True Button9.Visible = True Button10.Visible = True Button11.Visible = True Button16.Visible = True Else
btnStartCycle.Visible = False Button9.Visible = False Button10.Visible = False Button11.Visible = False Button16.Visible = False End If
Exit Sub
ErrorHandler: LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: SetObjectSecurity(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError Resume Next End Sub
